workflow: Workflow B — Direct keyword → page → generate (Hair restoration authority articles)

pages.title: FUE vs DHI Hair Transplant: Which Technique Is Right for You?

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Authority article (~1,800 words). REQUIRED H2s: (1) FUE vs DHI: Quick Comparison, (2) How FUE Works Step by Step, (3) How DHI Works Step by Step, (4) Graft Survival Rates: What the Data Shows, (5) Scarring and Recovery Differences, (6) Cost Comparison FUE vs DHI, (7) Which Technique for Your Hair Loss Pattern, (8) What to Ask Your Clinic, (9) FAQ. Link to /treatments/hair-restoration, country guides.

body.title: FUE vs DHI Hair Transplant: Which Technique Is Right for You?
body.metaTitle: FUE vs DHI Hair Transplant — Comparison Guide | MedCover
body.metaDescription: FUE and DHI are the two main hair transplant techniques. Compare graft survival, scarring, recovery time, and cost to choose the right method.

pages.title: Hair Transplant in Istanbul: Complete Patient Guide

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — City authority guide (~1,800 words). Istanbul performs 500,000+ hair transplants/year. REQUIRED H2s: (1) Why Istanbul, (2) How to Choose a Clinic, (3) Typical 3-Day Itinerary, (4) Cost Breakdown, (5) Recovery Hotels, (6) Red Flags, (7) FAQ. Link to /guides/turkey-hair-restoration-guide, /guides/turkey/istanbul-hair-restoration-guide.

pages.title: Hair Transplant Graft Count Calculator: How Many Grafts Do You Need?

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Tool-style authority article (~1,800 words). REQUIRED H2s: (1) What Is a Graft?, (2) Norwood Scale Guide, (3) Graft Count by Hair Loss Stage (table), (4) How Clinics Calculate Graft Needs, (5) Why Graft Count Affects Price, (6) Over-Harvesting Risks, (7) FAQ. Include reference tables for Norwood I–VII.

body.title: Hair Transplant Graft Count: How Many Grafts Do You Need?
body.metaTitle: Hair Transplant Graft Count Guide — Norwood Scale | MedCover
body.metaDescription: How many grafts do you need? Norwood scale guide with graft counts by hair loss stage, pricing impact, and over-harvesting risks explained.

body.title: Best Age for a Hair Transplant: What the Data Shows
body.metaTitle: Best Age for Hair Transplant — Patient Guide | MedCover
body.metaDescription: Most surgeons recommend waiting until 25–30 for a hair transplant. Learn why age matters, progression risks, and when to consult a surgeon.

Include week-by-week timeline table.

body.metaDescription: Hair transplant results take 6–12 months. Week-by-week timeline from scabbing and shock loss to full growth — what to expect at each stage.
